category_sources: Official ExactCODE page describes minised as a smaller, cheaper, faster SED implementation.
source_facts.description says it is a smaller, cheaper, faster SED implementation.
display_name_sources: Official ExactCODE page uses the project name minised.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ExactCODE minised page, which is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official ExactCODE page states the work-in-progress code is available in this Subversion repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official ExactCODE minised page.
tags_sources: Official ExactCODE page describes minised as a maintained SED implementation with fixes, POSIX conformance work, and tests.
